Grow a Garden 2
# Remotes

Teleport Back to Plot
```lua
local Event = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").SharedModules.Packet.RemoteEvent
Event:FireServer(
    buffer.fromstring("\x01\x00\x06GardenC\x00\xC0\x97\xC8C\x06\x81\x12C\b\xAC\x03\xC3")
)
```
Teleport to Sell
```lua
-- This code was generated by Cobalt
-- https://github.com/notpoiu/cobalt

local Event = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").SharedModules.Packet.RemoteEvent
Event:FireServer(
    buffer.fromstring("\x01\x00\x04SellC\x00\xF2\xE0\x86C\x06\x01\x12C\xDE\"\xFE\xC2")
)
```

```lua
-- This code was generated by Cobalt
```

Harvest Fruit
```lua
-- This code was generated by Cobalt
-- https://github.com/notpoiu/cobalt

local Event = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").SharedModules.Packet.RemoteEvent
Event:FireServer(
    buffer.fromstring("\xB4\x00$<plant id>$<fruit id>")
)
```

# Folders

Stock Values (shop items)
```lua
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").StockValues
```
Seed Shop
```lua
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").StockValues.SeedShop
```
Gear Shop
```lua
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").StockValues.GearShop
```
Exclusive Shop
```lua
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").StockValues.ExclusiveShop
```
Crate Shop
```lua
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").StockValues.CrateShop
```
Night Time (bool)
```lua
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Night
```
Seed Shop (GUI)
```lua
game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.SeedShop
```
Gardens
```lua
workspace.Gardens
```
Wild Pet Spawn
```lua
workspace.Map.WildPetRef
```
Server Values
```lua
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").ServerValues
```
Shared Data
```lua
game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").SharedData
```
